title: Rollins to Present at Upcoming Investor Conferences
text: ATLANTA , Aug. 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL) ("Rollins" or the "Company"), a premier global consumer and commercial services company, today announced that Rollins Leadership plans to present and attend meetings at the following investor conferences: Stifel London Industrials Summit at the Stifel London Office, September 7 th, 2023, presenting 4:30 a.m. – 5:10 a.m.

title: Why Is Rollins (ROL) Down 4.4% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Rollins (ROL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Rollins (ROL) is Benefiting From a Solid Demand Environment
text: Rollins (ROL) is benefited by a strong demand environment and a healthy combination of organic and inorganic growth. Integration risk persists.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Performance Since Launch
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF™, with a few minor twists. The portfolio gained 2.44% in July, underperforming the S&P 500 by 0.77%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 14.72%. Since inception, the portfolio is generating 2.75% of alpha over the S&P 500.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For August 2023
text: The watchlist from July posted a gain of 5.36% last month, outperforming the SPDR S&P 500 Trust ETF and Vanguard's Dividend Appreciation ETF. The top 15 dividend growth stocks for August offer an average dividend yield of 1.58% and appear about 32% undervalued based on dividend yield theory. Since inception, September 2020, the watchlist is beating VIG by 5.24% and SPY by 4.53%.

title: 3 Stocks That Need to Follow Elon Musk's Rebranding Moves
text: I don't know if you've been following the Elon Musk rebranding of Twitter. He's now calling it “X” and plans to turn the social media platform into a super app where you can do just about everything.
